posts.text: On the surface, the low saving rate in America looks like proof that households are running short of cash. There are, though, some benign explanations for the trend https://www.economist.com/finance-and-economics/2026/06/21/americas-savings-rate-has-plunged?taid=6a3c4ec227dbeb0001f2f3dc&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: If you think the new Fed chair is a hawk you’re crazy. They will run it hot… they will print and create inflation. We are going to have an incredible 2 year run… I’m buying precious metals with both hands. Amazing how the narrative has changed in the last 6 months or so.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
